data.title: CHICAGO WELCOMES BUSINESS LEADERS FROM 30+ COUNTRIES AS GLOBAL COMPANIES REASSESS WHERE TO INVEST IN THE U.S.
data.description: An event called SelectCHI will gather top executives from around the world in Chicago from April 30 to May 1. The meeting comes at a time when global unpredictability is influencing investment decisions in the United States. This event will address the impact of factors such as increasing expenses, geopolitical instability, and changing investment trends.

data.title: NERDS ON SITE INC. REPORTS Q3 FY2026 RESULTS: RETURN TO PROFITABILITY AND CONTINUED REVENUE MOMENTUM
data.description: Nerds On Site Inc., a prominent provider of managed IT and cybersecurity services for small and medium-sized businesses, has announced its return to profitability and ongoing revenue growth. The company, trading as CSE: NERD and OTC: NOSUF, reported this positive development on April 29, 2026, in Toronto. With these updates, NOS is poised for continued success in its industry.

data.title: Why Is Old Dominion Stock Falling Wednesday?
data.description: Old Dominion Freight Line Inc. (NASDAQ: ODFL) witnessed a decline in its shares following the release of its first-quarter 2026 results. The company reported a 2.9% decrease in revenue, totaling $1.335 billion, which surpassed analyst estimates of $1.312 billion. This drop was primarily attributed to a 7.7% decrease in less-than-truckload (LTL) tons per day, correlating with a 7.9% reduction in shipments per day during the quarter. Additionally, LTL revenue per hundredweight, excluding fuel surcharges, saw a 4.4% increase compared to the previous year. Operating income also experienced a decline, dropping by 6.1% to $317.3 million. For more details, the full news article is available for reading on Benzinga.com.

data.title: ETH expected to hit $3,500 from current $2,300 support level, as indicators point to bullish move ahead.
data.description: The recent consolidation of Ethereum above the $2,300 support level indicates a strong potential for a price increase towards $3,500. This is supported by momentum indicators and patterns showing significant accumulation of holdings by large investors. This pattern suggests that the cryptocurrency is poised for a substantial upward movement in the near future.

data.title: Powell Vs. Bitcoin: Why Crypto ETFs Trade Like Tech Stocks On Fed Day
data.description: Bitcoin, known as "digital gold," is experiencing a shift in its perception as it is now behaving more like high-growth tech stocks rather than a safe haven asset like gold. On Federal Reserve announcement days, popular Bitcoin ETFs such as iShares Bitcoin Trust (IBIT), Fidelity Wise Origin Bitcoin Fund (FBTC), ARK 21Shares Bitcoin ETF (ARKB), and Grayscale Bitcoin Trust ETF (GBTC) are closely mirroring equity benchmarks. Prior to the latest Fed policy decision and Jerome Powell's press conference, these ETFs were trading similarly to the S&P 500, with marginal decreases of less than 1%. The Nasdaq 100 index was also trading at a slight increase of less than 1%. This behavior indicates a notable shift in the trading patterns of major Bitcoin ETFs towards aligning with traditional stock market movements.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Iran Makes Hormuz Offer; Apple, Amazon, Google Lead Earnings
data.description: The stock market is currently experiencing record highs, with a particular focus on the performance of key companies such as Apple, Amazon, and Google. The recent cancellation of talks with Iran has also impacted market sentiments. The Dow Jones Futures are indicating potential opportunities, especially with Iran's offer related to the Hormuz Strait. Earnings reports from major players like Apple, Amazon, and Google will be closely monitored to gauge market trends.

data.title: VVT Med Signs Largest European Distribution Agreement to Date; Distributor Joins as Investor
data.description: A distributor has committed to a minimum purchase of approximately CAD $2.3 million over the next five years. Additionally, the distributor has also become an investor in the company's ongoing private placement. This five-year agreement includes substantial financial commitments and signifies a new partnership in business operations.

data.title: Survey by Coinbase: Majority of crypto investors view Bitcoin as undervalued. Onchain data indicates Bitcoin is exiting bear market.
data.description: A recent survey conducted by Coinbase and analysis of onchain data indicate that Bitcoin could be undervalued and approaching the conclusion of its bear market period. The survey findings, along with onchain metrics, paint a picture of potential market undervaluation for Bitcoin. This news suggests that the leading cryptocurrency may be poised for an upturn, with the data pointing towards the end of the bear market cycle. Investors and analysts may find these insights valuable as they consider their positions in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Ripple Prime offers Bitcoin options trading to institutional clients, enabling them to trade through a prime brokerage layer using current accounts.
data.description: Institutions now have the opportunity to engage in Bitcoin options trading through a prime brokerage layer using their current accounts.
